sections.title: Cycling
sections.description: There's something about being on a bike that clears the head better than any debugging session. Vancouver's trails make it easy to disappear for a few hours and come back with a fresh perspective.

sections.title: Hiking
sections.description: From the North Shore mountains to wherever the trail takes me. The best ideas usually show up somewhere between the trailhead and the summit.

sections.title: Reading
sections.description: I'm a firm believer that good engineers read widely - not just technical books, but anything that builds empathy and perspective. Always happy to swap recommendations.
